description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages lint, build, publish, and mirror, default tags gcp and interruptible jobs. In the lint stage add a hadolint job using hadolint/hadolint:v2.10.0-debian that runs `hadolint *Dockerfile`, a shellcheck job using koalaman/shellcheck-alpine:v0.9.0 that runs `shellcheck -x scripts/*.sh`, and a shfmt job using mvdan/shfmt:v3.6.0-alpine that runs `shfmt -i 2 -sr -d scripts/*.sh`. In the build stage add three jobs—build (runs only if $CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE != "tezos"), build-runtime-amd64 and build-runtime-arm64 (both run only if $CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE == "tezos"); each extends a template that uses the image `${CI_REGISTRY}/tezos/docker-images/ci-docker:v1.9.0`, runs before_script `./scripts/docker_registry_auth.sh`, uses the service `docker:${DOCKER_VERSION}-dind` with DOCKER_VERSION set to 24.0.7, and executes the scripts `./scripts/version.sh`, `./scripts/docker_wait_for_daemon.sh`, `./scripts/docker_check_version.sh ${DOCKER_VERSION}`, `./scripts/create_docker_images.sh "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}" "${DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_SUFFIX}" "${DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_CACHE_SUFFIX}" "${DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_EXTRA}" "${TARGETARCH}"`, `./scripts/check_versions.sh "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}" "${DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_SUFFIX}" "${TARGETARCH}"`, and `./scripts/docker_push_all.sh "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}" "${DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_SUFFIX}" "${DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_EXTRA}" "${TARGETARCH}"`; the build job sets empty tag suffix variables, the amd64 job sets TARGETARCH=amd64, and the arm64 job sets TARGETARCH=arm64 and runs on the gcp_arm64 tag. In the publish stage add a merge-manifests-runtime job that runs only if $CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE == "tezos", uses the same docker image, and runs `./scripts/docker_merge_manifests.sh "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}" "${DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_SUFFIX}"`. In the mirror stage add a mirror job that runs only when $AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, $AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, and $AWS_ECR are present, uses the same docker image, defines AWS_ECR_IMAGE as `${AWS_ECR}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}` and GCP_ARTIFACT_REGISTRY_IMAGE as `${GCP_REGISTRY}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}`, and runs two `./scripts/mirror.sh` commands targeting those images. Global variables define DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_CACHE_SUFFIX as `${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DIFF_BASE_SHA}`, DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_EXTRA as `${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}`, and DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_SUFFIX as `${CI_COMMIT_SHA}`.
